VAL-EVENTS-001.notes: Tapping Football, Basketball, and Concert bottom tabs switches content to the correct category each time. The active tab is visually highlighted with blue text and icon. Each tab renders its own category heading, banner, and event cards.

steps.action: Login and navigate to Goods home
steps.observed: 5 bottom tabs visible: Goods, Football, Basketball, Concert, My
Football tab highlighted blue, shows Football heading and match cards with country flags
Basketball tab highlighted blue, shows Basketball heading and NBA match cards
Concert tab highlighted blue, shows Concert heading and artist event cards

VAL-EVENTS-002.notes: Football tab displays a landscape banner image, 'Find matches' search bar, and match cards with country flags and team names (Jordan VS Argentina, Algeria VS Austria, Brazil VS Germany, Spain VS France). Each card shows date, time, venue, and price.

steps.expected: Banner, search, and match cards visible
steps.observed: Banner image shown at top, 'Find matches' search input visible, 4 match cards displayed
Cards show country flag emojis (🇯🇴🇦🇷🇩🇿🇦🇹🇧🇷🇩🇪🇪🇸🇫🇷), team names in 'X VS Y' format, dates, venues, and prices

VAL-EVENTS-003.notes: Basketball tab displays a banner image and match cards with NBA team names (Phoenix Suns VS Los Angeles Lakers, Lakers VS Spurs, Warriors VS Celtics, Bucks VS Nets). Each card shows date, venue, and price.

steps.expected: Banner and NBA match cards visible
steps.observed: Banner image shown, Basketball heading with basketball emoji, 4 NBA match cards displayed
Cards show team names in 'X VS Y' format (Suns VS Lakers, etc.), dates, venues, and prices

VAL-EVENTS-004.notes: Concert tab displays event cards with artist photos (Taylor Swift, Ed Sheeran, The Weeknd, Beyoncé), event names, dates, venues, and prices. 'Find a star or performance' search bar is visible at top.

steps.expected: Search bar and artist event cards visible
steps.observed: 'Find a star or performance' search input visible, Concert heading with music note emoji, 4 artist event cards with photos displayed

steps.expected: Artist photos, event name, date, venue
steps.observed: Cards show artist thumbnail photos, artist name, event title, date, venue, and price

VAL-EVENTS-012.notes: After rapid tab switching (Football→Basketball→Concert→Football→Concert→Basketball), each tab still shows only its own events. Football shows only country VS country matches, Basketball shows only NBA games, Concert shows only artist events. No data leakage detected.

steps.observed: All 6 rapid clicks completed without error

steps.action: Verify Basketball tab after rapid switching
steps.observed: Only NBA match cards visible (Suns VS Lakers, etc.), no football or concert data

steps.action: Verify Football tab after rapid switching
steps.observed: Only football match cards visible (Jordan VS Argentina, etc.), no basketball or concert data

steps.action: Verify Concert tab after rapid switching
steps.observed: Only artist event cards visible (Taylor Swift, Ed Sheeran, etc.), no football or basketball data

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Tab navigation correctly switches event categories with visual highlighting (VAL-EVENTS-001). Football tab shows country flag matches (VAL-EVENTS-002). Basketball tab shows NBA match cards (VAL-EVENTS-003). Concert tab shows artist event cards with photos (VAL-EVENTS-004). No cross-contamination after rapid tab switching (VAL-EVENTS-012). No console errors detected.
